title: IssueStatus
description: Tracks a GitHub issue through the AI planning and PR pipeline. Produced/updated by backend/, consumed by dashboard/.

task_id.description: References the task that created this issue

github_issue_url.description: URL of the created GitHub issue

status.description: Current status of the issue in the pipeline

plan.description: The AI-generated implementation plan posted as a comment

pr_url.description: URL of the PR once opened
